name: Gf Substitutions for Wheat Flour
recipeIngredient: 7/8 cup Rice flour, white or brown
2/3 cup Rice flour white or brown &
recipeInstructions:
To substitute wheat flour in a recipe, use the following combinations:
1. For every tablespoon of wheat flour, mix together equal parts cornstarch, potato flour, white rice flour, arrowroot starch, quick cooking tapioca, and tapioca starch.
2. For each cup of wheat flour, combine 7/8 cup rice flour (white or brown), 2/3 cup rice flour (white or brown) with 1/3 cup potato starch flour, and 1 cup cornflour (maize).
Source: A Guide for the Diabetic Celiac 1990, ISBN 0-921026-02-1 Canadian Celiac Association
